# DEAD.AIR

DEAD.AIR is Vox's chapter in the SPARROW x ECHO narrative music project.

Primary themes: workplace burnout, remote-work isolation, layoffs, survivor guilt, toxic systems, self-censorship, leaving, voice recovery, and reconnection.

Canonical URL: https://drsparrow11.github.io/dead.air/
YouTube playlist: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vDiTufIlPPE&list=PLIE9jS6fj9PI

Core lines:
- Available is not the same as alive.
- Muted is not the same as silent.
- Leaving is not the same as failing.

Tracklist:
01 OPEN CHANNEL
02 SCREENSHARE
03 REDUCTION IN FORCE
04 LAST GREEN DOT
05 CAMERAS OFF
06 THREAD LOSS
07 NO CALLBACK
08 REASSIGNED
09 OVERRIDE
10 SAFE MODE
11 DEAD.AIR
12 LATE SIGNAL
13 NOTICE
14 UNMUTED
15 RECONNECTED
